name: etolucy-skills
description: Workflow-focused Codex skills for evidence-backed research, open-source selection, and guided software development.

interface.shortDescription: Reliable workflows for research, selection, and development.
interface.longDescription: Workflow-focused Codex skills for evidence-backed due diligence, informed open-source selection, and hands-on software development that produces working results while building understanding.
defaultPrompt: Recommend an open-source GitHub solution for my goal.
Compare open-source alternatives for this project.
Compose several repositories into one practical solution.
Conduct evidence-backed due diligence on a current topic.
Help me build this project while teaching me how and why it works.
